The Same Equation Everywhere

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.

QUESTION:
What was the teacher’s panel discussion about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain how the three examples function as evidence for the teacher’s larger claim about cross-cultural mathematical discovery. Use academic language.
